hero.title: Study Planner
hero.description: Create a study plan, break it into tasks, log focused study sessions, and review progress.

differences.title: Keep study plans connected to daily work
differences.description: Study Planner turns a broad learning goal into tasks, study logs, and a progress review inside the Ansiversa shell.

items.title: Plan
items.description: Create a dated study plan with a subject and learning goal.

items.title: Tasks
items.description: Break the plan into prioritized tasks with due dates and status.

items.title: Review
items.description: Use study logs to see minutes, task completion, and recent focus areas.

feel.title: A practical path from goal to progress
feel.description: The workflow keeps plans, tasks, and logged sessions in one focused learning workspace.

items.title: Create the plan
items.description: Define what needs to be learned and when it should be completed.

items.title: Manage tasks
items.description: Track open, in-progress, and completed study work.

items.title: Review progress
items.description: Check study minutes, completion rate, and recent logs.

audiences.title: Who uses Study Planner
audiences.description: Useful for students, self-learners, and professionals managing structured study.

items.title: Students
items.description: Organize revision, coursework, and exam preparation.

items.title: Self-learners
items.description: Turn independent learning goals into steady tasks.

resourceSection.title: Study planning essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed for the approved Study Planner workflow.

items.title: Study plans
items.description: Create current-user plans with subjects, goals, dates, and status.

items.title: Study tasks
items.description: Add prioritized tasks under plans and update task status.

items.title: Study logs
items.description: Record focused minutes and reflections for progress review.

groupedSection.title: Move from planning to review
groupedSection.description: Use one protected workflow for planning study work and checking progress.

items.name: Plan
items.description: Create a dated study plan around a clear goal.

items.name: Tasks
items.description: Break the plan into priority work items.

items.name: Progress review
items.description: See completion rate, study minutes, and recent logs.

technicalSection.title: Approved Study Planner workflow
technicalSection.description: Study Planner follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture and is approved as App #024.
items: Current-user owned StudyPlans, StudyPlanTasks, and StudyLogs tables.
Typed React service layer, Zustand store, and responsive module routes.

finalCta.title: Open Study Planner
finalCta.description: Create a study plan and start tracking focused learning work.
